Downsampled cells are displayed, roughly: Ka whakaaturia ngā pūtau kua whakaitihia te tauira, he rite tonu ki te whatunga tapawhā <2> </2>. Whakanuia kia kite i ngā pūtau taumira katoa.
Finish using the measurement tool before: Whakaotihia te whakamahi i te taputapu ine i mua i te haere tonu ki te huahua.

Processing your sketch. This should only: Te tukatuka i to huahua. He wa poto noa tenei.
Reports not configured: Ko nga ripoata kaore i whirihorahia
Results are calculated when a sketch is: Ka tatauhia ngā hua ina hangaia, ina whakahoutia rānei tētahi tātuhi. Ka taea te wehewehe i ngā tapatoru hei whakaaro mō ngā whakawhiti anti-meridian, hei taupatupatu rānei ki ētahi atu tātuhi i roto i tētahi kohinga.
SeaSketch creates optimized layers for f: Ka hangaia e SeaSketch ngā paparanga kua arotauhia kia tere te tukatuka. Kotahi noa te wā e hiahiatia ana kia hangaia ai ēnei, i ngā wā katoa rānei ka whakahoutia he paparanga pūtake.
Select cells where this property is: Tīpakohia ngā pūtau kei reira tēnei āhuatanga
Select one or more options to limit cell: Tīpakohia tētahi, neke atu rānei ngā kōwhiringa hei whakawhāiti i ngā pūtau ki ngā mea e ōrite ana ngā uara. Ki te kore he kōwhiringa e mahia, e kore tēnei tātari e whakamahia.

These metrics are calculated in order to: Ka tatauhia ēnei inenga hei whakarato i ngā tatauranga whai hua pēnei i te ōrau kapinga. Pērā i ngā paparanga kua arotauhia, ka tatauhia anō mēnā ka whakahoutia he paparanga pūtake.
